lessons.title: Digital Addresses: IP Fundamentals
lessons.description: Understand IPv4, IPv6, public vs private addresses, and the loopback interface.

lessons.title: Ports: The Apartment Numbers
lessons.description: Learn how services are identified by port numbers and why scanning ports is a hacker's first step.

lessons.title: Are You There? The `ping` Command
lessons.description: Send ICMP echo requests to test connectivity and discover live hosts.

lessons.title: Tracing the Path: `traceroute`
lessons.description: Map the journey of packets across the internet and identify network bottlenecks.

lessons.title: Local Network Recon: `netstat` and `ss`
lessons.description: Inspect open ports, listening services, and active connections on your own machine.

lessons.title: DNS: The Phonebook of the Internet
lessons.description: Translate human-friendly names to IP addresses using `nslookup` and `dig`.
